claim_bullets.bullet_text: Simulacra duplicate appearance and abilities of enemy humans, but not magical powers. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.222-225)
Homunculi are pseudo-life forms with human-like intelligence and speech, created through ancient magic. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.222-225)
Blobs are failed homunculus creations, turned feral, with iron-corroding liquid inside and cannot critical. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.222-225)

source_record_text: Magical creatures from the ancient kingdom period, including simulacra, homunculi, blobs, puppet golems, imitators, things, obsidian dogs, gargoyles, sí, and stalkers, created through ancient magic with specific abilities and behaviors.
